transcript.clean_text: the total Suites is available to watch live and On Demand each and every day on gcn Plus stage two began with Stefan Kung in the leader's Jersey the stage in and around the same area of central Northern Switzerland in berel Munster the start three classified climbs all third category climbs a couple of Sprints within a kilometer the tiso kilometer bringing bonus seconds six in total for two sprints and one final intermediate Sprint that counts towards the points competition as well 170 odd kilometers stage two Tour de Swiss probably one for the sprinters the day started with Missy share saying goodbye on home roads spawn and raised just a few kilometers from where today's stage took place his final tour de Swiss a god of Honor a lovely moment as Fabian cancellara fight the starting gun Amazon would make it into the Breakaway the former Swiss National Champion up there with the Canadian Rider from q36.5 Nicholas Zukowski Zukowski took the first two classified climbs and would be going into the king of the mountains competition lead but in the tiso kilometer Mishi share the man who knew what he was doing leading from start to finish to take the bonus seconds and the tiso watch model Schmidt took the remaining second and then as what fanart had tried it would be Remco ivnable to take the other bonus second back at the end of that fantastic kilometer long double intermediate Sprint Moment that was the only action in GC terms you're gonna get from the Peloton but there was some action of Another Kind I'm afraid a nasty crash 31 kilometers from the finish and taking out quite a few Riders it would take them time to get back on most of the main sprinters were there and in action however and once the break was brought back by yombo visma on the final classified climb of the day everywhere we would be ready for action Zukowski just about three more points his lead a healthy one going into stage three took those points for the points classification in the final intermediate Sprint and when it came to the Sprint itself everybody was involved even the Roman balde helping to lead his team up for DSM wildfinart launched the Sprint itself 310 meters to go roughly when he went he was in the black Jersey on the right-hand side but look at the white jersey on the left back in business back to racing and Binny is back at the winning stage two of the daughter Suites in front of arnoldima and WAD for night Q celebrations almost pandemonium with the Eritrean fans there they went absolutely crazy even delaying gurmei's passage to the podium get my winning for the first time since February after that crash as well that he suffered in the classics beating Demar and fanat and showing Great Signs on the way to the tour a good fifth place too for Peter Sagan who's back from altitude on his final ever Tour de Swiss but on his way to a Tour de France debut the era train Superstar Jeremiah winning in big Style one of only a couple of opportunities for sprinters and fast finishes this week and in the overall General classification a little change in terms of time both evening Paul and fanat taking bonus seconds but Kung still leads going into day three as the Riders are ready to hit the mountains Stefan Kung winner of the opening time chart will take the yellow jersey for another day as we leave toughers heading from the German speaking part of Switzerland over into La suis romon the French speaking part over the cold demos very close to UCI HQ in egglet and a final climb to Villa venue for previous stages in this race and in the Tour de a big climb two first cats and a first touch with the real mountains the first of three big successive days in the general classification 143.8 kilometers long will Stefan Kung hold on who'll be there to challenge him you'll better watch it all live and On Demand on gcn Plus
